name: rimac-backend-challenge
description: Reto Técnico Backend para Rimac y Softtek usando Node.js 24+, AWS Serverless, Kysely y Arquitectura Funcional.

scripts.infra:check-tables: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal dynamodb list-tables
scripts.infra:check-queues: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal sqs list-queues
scripts.infra:check-lambdas: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal lambda list-functions
scripts.infra:logs-ingest: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal logs filter-log-events --log-group-name /aws/lambda/rimac-backend-challenge-dev-ingest --limit 10
scripts.infra:logs-pe: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal logs filter-log-events --log-group-name /aws/lambda/rimac-backend-challenge-dev-processPe --limit 15
scripts.infra:logs-cl: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal logs filter-log-events --log-group-name /aws/lambda/rimac-backend-challenge-dev-processCl --limit 15
scripts.infra:logs-complete: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal logs filter-log-events --log-group-name /aws/lambda/rimac-backend-challenge-dev-complete --limit 15
scripts.infra:check-pe-queue: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal sqs get-queue-attributes --queue-url http://sqs.us-east-1.localhost.localstack.cloud:4566/000000000000/SQS_PE --attribute-names ApproximateNumberOfMessages
scripts.infra:scan-ddb: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal dynamodb scan --table-name rimac-backend-challenge-appointments-dev
scripts.infra:read-pe-messages: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal sqs receive-message --queue-url http://sqs.us-east-1.localhost.localstack.cloud:4566/000000000000/SQS_PE --max-number-of-messages 5
scripts.infra:check-cl-queue: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal sqs get-queue-attributes --queue-url http://sqs.us-east-1.localhost.localstack.cloud:4566/000000000000/SQS_CL --attribute-names ApproximateNumberOfMessages
scripts.infra:read-cl-messages: docker exec -it rimac_challenge_localstack awslocal sqs receive-message --queue-url http://sqs.us-east-1.localhost.localstack.cloud:4566/000000000000/SQS_CL --max-number-of-messages 5

author: Franz Victorio
